channel.title: DuckDB on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in DuckDB on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Database for PostgreSQL - Flexible Server: DuckDB extension
item.description:
Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server now supports installing the DuckDB extension. The update notes that the feature is generally available.

  • Source: Azure Updates
